Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}I can't let people see me without my makeup on...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}I'll have to wait for everyone to go to sleep before I take it off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}I made sure to wake up earlier than anyone else this morning so I could put my makeup on first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}I really don't want anybody seeing me without it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}It's been a really rough three days, but it's almost over...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}What, can't you tell what I'm talking about?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 608}Trying to keep anyone from seeing me without my makeup, of course![n]{f 1 1}
